rule_metadata.name: ldapsearch
rule_metadata.description: Detection patterns for the tool 'ldapsearch' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project
rule_metadata.author: @mthcht

rules.rule_text:
rule ldapsearch
{
	meta:
		description = "Detection patterns for the tool 'ldapsearch' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project"
		author = "@mthcht"
		reference = "https://github.com/mthcht/ThreatHunting-Keywords"
		tool = "ldapsearch"
		rule_category = "greyware_tool_keyword"

	strings:
		$string1 = /ldapsearch\s.{0,1000}\sldap\:\/\//
		$string2 = /ldapsearch\s\-x\s\-h\s.{0,1000}\s\-s\sbase/
		$string3 = /ldapsearch\s\-h\s.{0,1000}\s\-x/

	condition:
		any of them
}
